summary: Full E2E testing of AgriFlow platform - backend and frontend. All critical flows tested: admin login, admin dashboard, admin users management, farmer registration, 4-step onboarding, farmer dashboard, farms/plots/devices management, sensor simulation, analytics, predictions, alerts, and logout.

ui_bugs.issue: Dark mode toggle button (Moon/Sun icon) lacks data-testid attribute - cannot be targeted reliably in automated tests
ui_bugs.selector: Button variant=ghost on line 70 of TopHeader.js

issues: KPI cards show skeleton loading state briefly before populating - expected behavior, works correctly after load
'Générer prédictions' button works but requires selecting a specific plot - the dropdown shows 'Toutes les parcelles' which is fine

action_items: Add data-testid='dark-mode-toggle' to the theme toggle button in TopHeader.js (line 70)
critical_code_review_comments: TopHeader.js: Dark mode toggle button missing data-testid attribute - minor testability gap
server.py is 860 lines - consider splitting into routes modules for maintainability (farms, devices, auth, admin)
set_cookies uses secure=False which is fine for dev/preview but should be True in production (HTTPS)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows work, minor dark mode testid issue)

seed_data_creation: Created test farmer uifarmer_1782764007@test.com with farm 'Ferme UI Test', plot 'Parcelle Nord B2', device 'Sonde Test 001'. Also created test farmers via pytest (testfarmer_XXXXXX@test.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% passing - all CRUD for farms/plots/devices/readings/alerts/predictions/admin endpoints. Frontend flows all working: landing page, admin login→dashboard→users, farmer register→onboarding (4 steps)→dashboard→exploitations→appareils→simuler lecture→analytiques→predictions→alertes→logout. Only minor issue: dark mode toggle button missing data-testid. App is French throughout, JWT via httpOnly cookies confirmed working.
